description_long: This is a modern wooden desk with a natural brown finish and a slightly curved front edge, giving it a contemporary look. The desk features a thick, solid tabletop supported by two sturdy side panels, one of which extends to form a partial enclosure on the left side, creating an integrated open shelf or cubby. A circular cable management hole is present on the rear left corner of the tabletop, allowing for organized routing of wires. The right side of the desk is open, providing ample legroom for the user. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, and the overall construction appears robust and functional. The design is minimalistic, with no visible drawers or handles, emphasizing clean lines and practicality.
description: A modern, brown wooden desk with a curved front edge, integrated open shelf on the left, and a cable management hole on the tabletop.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved front edge, open right side for legroom, and the integrated shelf on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid side panel and the cable management hole on the tabletop's rear corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight back edge, the open shelf structure on the left, and the overall width of the desk.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open leg space and the distinctive curve of the front edge.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the curved edge and open legroom, while the left side features an integrated open shelf and the rear left corner has a cable management hole.
